nodes.label: AI as route planning and data extraction tool
nodes.label_negative: Manual route planning and address extraction
nodes.grounding_span: I've been trying to use AI to help me extract relevant addresses or locations from lists, emails, and websites to help me determine worthwhile assignments and efficient routes

nodes.label: AI accuracy and reliability
nodes.grounding_span: I would need to know that the AI's determination is accurate

nodes.label: AI for communication and scheduling tasks
nodes.label_negative: Human handling of communication and scheduling
nodes.grounding_span: I still handle things like updating my schedule of assignments and responding to emails from schedulers. I don't think AI is ready to handle those tasks yet

nodes.label: AI as incremental tool in a continuum of technological improvement
nodes.grounding_span: I see AI as the latest in a series of technological advances that have enhanced rather than replaced my field

nodes.label: AI for instruction comprehension and requirement extraction
nodes.label_negative: Manual reading and extraction of project requirements
nodes.grounding_span: I would like to start using AI to read project instructions and extract all the requirements for completing assignments for the project

nodes.label: Efficiency and time savings
nodes.grounding_span: It's helpful because it instantly extracts the addresses

nodes.label: Accuracy and error avoidance
nodes.grounding_span: I wouldn't want there to be an error like responding inappropriately or not at all or misplacing an assignment due date

nodes.label: Professional competence and skill preservation
nodes.grounding_span: I'm not concerned with AI taking over any of the skills required for my job since it requires me to physically go to different locations

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI's data extraction capability
nodes.grounding_span: I have been most satisfied with its ability to extract data

nodes.label: Hesitation to delegate final judgment to AI
nodes.grounding_span: I've been making that determination on my own, but I'd like to get to the point of trusting the AI's judgement

nodes.label: Optimistic expectation of AI improvement
nodes.grounding_span: I think AI will get better, and I will be able to rely on it being accurate in time

nodes.label: Resistance to AI for communication and scheduling
nodes.grounding_span: I don't think AI is ready to handle those tasks yet

nodes.label: Incremental trust-building through task decomposition
nodes.grounding_span: I work back and forth with the AI on these tasks because it isn't able to handle it entirely on its own from start to finish

nodes.label: Pragmatic calibration based on task complexity
nodes.grounding_span: With the rewording responses tasks, less input from me is needed because there aren't many steps involved
